rationale: Review 2 identifies a genuine generality deficiency: mapsTo_fiber, mapsTo_fiber_symm, and fiberHomeomorph are all unnecessarily restricted to singleton preimages when their proofs work for any s : Set B (confirmed by the diff — map_proj alone closes the general case, and eq_comm in fiberHomeomorph is a singleton artifact). Acting on Review 2 yields more reusable API. Review 1's finding is about proof-level deduplication, not generality, and leaves the API unchanged.
